scripts.test: npm run test --prefix packages/core && npm run test --prefix packages/common && npm run test --prefix packages/express-http && npm run test --prefix packages/fastify-http && npm run test --prefix packages/typeorm && npm run test --prefix packages/security && npm run test --prefix packages/mailer
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/core && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/common && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/express-http && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/fastify-http && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/typeorm && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/security && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/mailer
